fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a unique code for the Create Reminders Setup

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the Create Reminders Setup

fields.name: Only Overdue Amount Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies if reminder should list all open entries or only entries with overdue amount

fields.name: Include Entries On Hold
fields.tooltip: Specifies if entries on hold should be included in the reminder

fields.name: Set Header Level to all Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the highest level should be set on all reminder lines. If this value is set, then all lines will get the highest line level. Otherwise each entry will get incremented individually.
